name: FIRST NATIONAL CORP /VA/
summary: First National Corporation is a Virginia-chartered bank holding company that owns First Bank, a commercial bank operating 33 branch offices, one loan production office, and a customer service center. The Bank offers consumer loans, residential mortgages, home equity loans, commercial loans, deposit products (checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRAs), treasury management, and wealth management services including estate planning and investment management, serving individuals, small and medium-sized businesses, non-profits, and local governmental entities in Virginia and northern North Carolina.
